evals.name: vague-ai-request
evals.prompt: Our bank wants to use AI to improve customer service, but the problem is vague. Help me frame it into something researchable and pilotable.
evals.expected_behavior: Preserves ambiguity, identifies stakeholders/workflows/decision points, creates falsifiable hypotheses, separates business and technical metrics, and produces literature search directions.

evals.name: unclear-risk-ops-problem
evals.prompt: Risk operations says case handling is inefficient. I don't know whether this is prediction, prioritization, workflow mining, or document AI. Frame the problem.
evals.expected_behavior: Classifies possible problem shapes, maps stakeholders, surfaces missing data and decision points, and recommends next clarification steps before solutioning.
